overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a student character walking through a historic stone cloister corridor and entering a Transfiguration classroom. The clip features high-quality Gothic architecture with seamless transition from a covered outdoor walkway to an indoor classroom setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone cloister walkway with Gothic arches

events.description: character turns right at corridor corner into darker interior section
green magical light becomes visible on left wall near the corridor end
character approaches and opens large wooden door to enter the classroom building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone corridor, turning right at the corner, and approaching the classroom entrance while holding a wand

entered.detail: large cylindrical stone columns supporting the corridor roof with carved capitals
stone vaulted ceiling with exposed wooden beams creating a rhythmic pattern
large weathered stone tiles with moss growing in gaps
lush green foliage and trees visible through open Gothic archways
medieval-style iron lanterns mounted on stone walls providing warm light
magical green luminescent object floating near the wall
heavy dark wooden double doors with metal studs and arched top

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered stone cloister with high Gothic arches, passing sturdy stone pillars and wall-mounted lanterns. Natural light filters through the open sides revealing greenery outside. The corridor darkens after a right turn, leading to a large wooden door at the end.

scene_state.functional_zone: Transfiguration classroom with high vaulted ceiling

events.description: character enters classroom and sits at wooden desk in the front row
UI element appears indicating Transfiguration class is in session

agents.ego_description: enters the classroom and sits at a desk in the front row, joining other students for the lesson while facing the teacher

notable_agents.action: teacher standing at the front of the classroom near the blackboard
students in dark robes sitting at wooden benches taking notes

entered.detail: long wooden benches and desks arranged in rows facing the front
high arched wooden ceiling with dark exposed beams and rafters
ornate hanging chandelier with multiple candle-style lights
decorative wooden cabinet with glass doors containing magical artifacts
framed paintings in gold frames hanging on the stone walls

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a large classroom interior with high vaulted ceilings and wooden beams. The character sits at a desk among other students in dark robes. An ornate cabinet and framed portraits adorn the stone walls, while a chandelier hangs from above. The teacher stands at the front as the Transfiguration lesson begins.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open-air Gothic cloister into the enclosed atmosphere of a scholarly classroom. It begins by trailing a character through a covered stone corridor where natural light filters through high arches and greenery, passing sturdy pillars and wall-mounted lanterns. As the character makes a right turn, the environment darkens and narrows, leading the camera toward a large wooden door at the end of the hall. The scene then shifts seamlessly through the doorway into a vast interior featuring high vaulted ceilings, wooden beams, and a hanging chandelier. Finally, the camera settles as the character takes a seat at a desk among other robed students, facing a teacher at the front of the room surrounded by ornate cabinets and framed portraits.
